prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含原理科）最低位次分别为约7465名→7323名→16217名→7305名→19010名，走势极不稳定，2023年出现断档暴跌至16217名，2024年短暂恢复 至7305名，2025年再次暴跌至19010名，近两年波动剧烈；该校在甘肃省物理类招生计划2021年190人、2022年207人、2023年200人、2024年207人、2025年215人 ，2026年计划265人，较2025年大幅扩招50人（+23.3%），扩招幅度显著。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西南交通大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第49名， 近年排名稳中有升（2021年第51→2026年第49），学校层次较高；2023年声誉评价为中性/混合，2024–2026年无显著负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第94位，评价为“ 一般”；历史投档异常记录中2023年有低关注度断档信号，但整体声誉平稳；交通运输工程A+（全国顶尖）、土木工程A，均为该校王牌学科，与招生专业中的交 通运输类、土木工程等直接对应，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度为高热推荐，土木建 筑为分化观望；甘肃省2026年普通高考总人数218700人，较2025年（约179817人）明显增加，按近年比例估算物理类考生约147700人（+21.6%），考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争；省 控线数据2026年缺失；西南交通大学位于四川成都，属西南地区，与甘肃地理距离适中，甘肃考生对西南高校接受度较高；该校在甘肃招生占比近 年约1.1%–1.2%（2025年7人/598总），占比稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次暴跌至19010名的基准、2026年大幅扩招23.3%带来的竞争加剧效应、以及甘肃省物理类考生增 加约21.6%的叠加影响，扩招与考生增加基本对冲，但考虑到2025年位次已处于历史低位且学校排名上升、声誉平稳，预计2026年竞争略有缓和，位次小幅回升；预测最低位次约2 1163名，区间20663–21663名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including former Science Category) were approximately 7465 → 7323 → 16217 → 7305 → 19010, showing extreme instability. In 2023, there was a sudden drop to 16217, a brief recovery to 7305 in 2024, and another sharp drop to 19010 in 2025, with severe fluctuations in the last two years. The enrollment plan for this university in Gansu Province was 190 in 2021, 207 in 2022, 200 in 2023, 207 in 2024, 215 in 2025, and 265 in 2026, a significant expansion of 50 students (+23.3%) compared to 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southwest Jiaotong University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking was 49th in 2026, with a steady upward trend in recent years (51st in 2021 → 49th in 2026), indicating a high university level. The reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed in 2023, with no significant negative public opinion from 2024 to 2026. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 94th, rated as 'average'. Historical abnormal admission records show a low-attention drop signal in 2023, but overall reputation is stable. Transportation Engineering is A+ (top in China) and Civil Engineering is A, both flagship disciplines of the university, directly corresponding to majors like Transportation and Civil Engineering in the enrollment plan, providing strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly recommended in social popularity, while Civil Architecture is differentiated and watched. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Gansu Province is 218,700, a significant increase from approximately 179,817 in 2025. Based on recent proportions, Physics Category candidates are estimated at about 147,700 (+21.6%), expanding the overall competition. Provincial control line data for 2026 is missing. Southwest Jiaotong University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, in the Southwest region, with moderate geographical distance from Gansu. Gansu candidates have a high acceptance of Southwest universities. The university's enrollment proportion in Gansu has been stable at about 1.1%–1.2% in recent years (7 out of 598 total in 2025).

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the benchmark of the 2025 ranking drop to 19010, the intensified competition effect from the 23.3% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the superimposed impact of a 21.6% increase in Physics Category candidates in Gansu Province, the expansion and candidate increase roughly offset each other. However, considering that the 2025 ranking is already at a historical low and the university's ranking is rising with stable reputation, competition is expected to ease slightly in 2026, with a modest ranking recovery. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 21163, with a range of 20663–21663.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 21163, with a range of 20663–21663. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (20663) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Transportation). Candidates in the middle of the range should prioritize Tier 2 majors (Vehicle Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Automation, Communication Engineering, etc.), while also attempting Tier 1. Candidates near the upper limit of the range (21663) should use Tier 3 majors as safety options (Civil Engineering, Materials Science, Surveying and Mapping, etc.), and can also try Tier 2 majors. Although Civil Engineering is an A-level discipline, its social popularity is differentiated, offering high cost-effectiveness and worth attention.
